description: pre-submission gate: grep a rendered skill card for leftover VERIFY/SELECT human-review markers
rules: read-only: greps the card; never mutates it
reports markers_clean in the audit line — true only when no verify/select markers (visual spans, comments, or legend lines) remain
re-runnable: run it again after each round of manual card edits until clean
passing this gate does not replace required human legal/safety/owner review — it only confirms review markers were removed
usage: Set CARD to the path of a rendered skill-card.md (or leave unset to check ${record_store}/skill-card.md). Output: validate_submission.txt with the validator verdict; the audit JSON line carries markers_clean true/false. Exposed standalone so an edited card can be re-checked without re-discovering or re-rendering.
limitation: Single-pass grep for review markers only; it does not validate field correctness, schema, or legal/safety content. A card with no markers passes even if its values are wrong — human review is still required.
